On July 25, 2013, the Board held a regularly scheduled in-person meeting.
representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: By invitation of the Special Committee, representatives from BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter were also present throughout the meeting.
By invitation of the Special Committee, representatives from BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter were also present throughout the meeting.
Pamplona, as instructed by the Special Committee, who expressed interest in a transaction, including an acquisition of Mac-Gray by its portfolio company, CSC.

actor_relation_claims.role_detail: committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction

bid_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share

Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer.

Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share, including $19.00 of cash to be paid at closing and the remaining per share price to be paid in the form of options to be issued to Mac-Gray stockholders

event_claims.description: BofA Merrill Lynch contacted strategic and financial parties identified by the Special Committee.
event_claims.quote_text: During the next several weeks, in accordance with the directives of the Special Committee, BofA Merrill Lynch contacted the strategic and financial parties identified at the June 24th Special Committee meeting.

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a final-round proposal at $20.75 per share in cash.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share

event_claims.description: Party A reiterated that its prior $18.00 to $19.00 per share all-cash indication was its best and final offer.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on September 18, 2013, Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer.

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a final-round proposal valued at $21.50 per share, consisting of $19.00 cash and options.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share, including $19.00 of cash to be paid at closing and the remaining per share price to be paid in the form of options to be issued to Mac-Gray stockholders

event_claims.description: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication at the final-round deadline.
event_claims.quote_text: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest of an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share nor did it specify any reasons in connection therewith.

participation_count_claims.quote_text: At this meeting, representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch reviewed the preliminary indications of interest received from Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona as well as the Party A June 21 proposal, in each case from a financial point of view.

After discussion and in an effort to drive offers with increased value, the Special Committee authorized and instructed BofA Merrill Lynch to proceed with the staged disclosure as discussed at this meeting and to reach out to each of the four interested bidders and arrange management meetings.
